task_objective: Add a cutoff score flag so fuzzy name lookup suppresses matches below a user-provided score.
design_decisions: Expose the option as --cutoff-score with a SCORE metavar.
Validate cutoff scores as floats in the inclusive range 0.0 to 1.0.
Keep the existing default fuzzy threshold when the flag is omitted.
Suppress only the accepted match; keep candidates and score in JSON output for diagnostics.
results: Targeted red tests failed before implementation for the missing matcher parameter, missing help text, and unrecognized CLI flag.
